pros: Sprout Payroll Solutions has proven to be a reliable and efficient platform for managing payroll and HR-related processes.

review_title: Sprout is very convenient is easy to use, the price is quite cheaper than other HR software
author: Beverly I.
pros: Sprout's best feature is that they offer HR Management system that is very efficient and cost-effectively. With using Sprout, I can monitor my employees deployed from other parts of the country in an easy way using the geo-tag. Since employees have firsthand access to their time records, preparing payroll, is very convenient to use provided that the employees' data are correct and without any missing inputs.
cons: If there is a thing that can be improved using Sprout, it is the app because most of the time, we experience down times and sometimes doing bulk uploads are error even when you followed the right instructions and complied to what the system is saying. Also, bulk upload templates should be simplified, if possible, must choose and include only selected criteria that needs to be updated.
